title: Apply for Canadian Citizenship: People registered under the Indian Act - Canada.ca
content:
Apply for Canadian citizenship

## People registered under the Indian Act
If you’re registered under the Indian Act , you may already be a Canadian citizen . Even if you’re not, you have the right to be in Canada.
We’re working on a new section that will help adults (18 and above) and minors (under 18) registered under the Indian Act understand how they can become Canadian citizens.
Once ready, it will explain
- who is eligible for this application process and what requirements they must meet
- the required forms and documents
- how to pay the fees and submit an application
- what to do after you submit an application
While we work on the new section, you can review our processing guidance on citizenship for people registered under the Indian Act .

## Other citizenship applications
Even if you don’t meet the requirements to use this process, other options may be available to you.
Check the eligibility requirements for our other application processes:
- Canadian armed forces

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
